raw_consumer_statement:
On XX/XX/year>, I rented a car from XXXX and used the car for XXXX day and took a XXXX XXXX that costed {$19.00}. 

The problem however is the host that rented the car charged me {$69.00}, but after sending me his invoice, I saw that {$50.00} of these fees were from late fees due to him not paying his bill on time. 

The host offloaded these late fees onto me. XXXX has not helped me despite being in contact with them over 5 times and filing a XXXX complaint. 

Barclays has also not helped me, even after sending evidence that the bill is not my responsibility. 

My credit card ( Barclays ) needs to issue me a {$50.00} refund and refuses to help, and intentionally makes the dispute process difficult because they won't open a dispute over the phone and only will receive letters by fax or physical mail. 

Attached is the XXXX invoice of the XXXX bill with the {$50.00} of late fees, with the late fees circled in XXXX
